notes: Batch 20 is a uniform, single-source set of 257 AACloze cards from the MrPankow P/S (psychology/sociology) deck, spanning the 7C and 8A/8B subdecks, and is uniformly clean with no errors, warnings, or info findings. Every cloze {{cN::...}} is balanced and well-formed (including valid hint syntax such as {{c1::B.F. Skinner::dude}}, {{c1::...::in terms of stimuli}}, and {{c1::Pre-conventional::Stage}}), all inline HTML in the Text/Extra fields (b/i/u/font/div nesting) is reasonably balanced, and there is no LaTeX/MathJax to validate. All cloze deletions are text and every lives in the Extra field, so there are no image-only cloze cards; each answer_text correctly reveals its [...] (or hinted) blank with no empty, duplicate, or non-corresponding answers. The only non-blocking observations (intentionally not flagged) are occasional source-level typos (e.g., 'grouple' on card 1592264560445, 'stimuli'/'recieves'/'seperate'/'percieves'), informal or profane example wording, and several Erikson-stage cards whose trailing 'mnemonic:' label is fulfilled by an Extra image rather than text — none of which break studyability.
